info.name: aspnetrun Auth Bootstrap and Token Flow
info.description:
Bootstraps first admin user and tenant membership, then generates vendor and user tokens for local development.

Execution path:
1) Admin 1-5
2) Tenant (Vendor) 6-7
3) User 8
4) Optional checks 9-11

Folders:
- Admin
- Tenant (Vendor)
- User

item.name: Automation Flows
item.description: Run one folder at a time in Postman Runner for one-click flow automation.

item.name: Flow 1 - Vendor Setup and Token (One-Time Setup)

request.description: Creates the realm if missing. Keycloak returns 201 when created, and 409 if it already exists.
Creates vendor token client if missing. Returns 201 when created, 409 when already exists.

item.name: 4. Resolve Vendor User Id by Username
6. Bootstrap First Platform Admin Membership (Development Only)

request.description: Generates a usable vendor token. Run after steps 1-6.

exec: console.warn('vendor_token_client_secret is empty (and vendor_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

request.description: Generates a usable vendor token. Run after steps 1-6.

exec: console.warn('vendor_token_client_secret is empty (and vendor_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

item.name: Flow 3 - User Setup and Token (One-Time Setup)

request.description: Creates the realm if missing. Keycloak returns 201 when created, and 409 if it already exists.
Creates user token client if missing. Returns 201 when created, 409 when already exists.
Generates a usable user token. Run after admin setup (steps 1-5).

exec: console.warn('user_token_client_secret is empty (and user_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

request.description: Generates a usable user token. Run after admin setup (steps 1-5).

exec: console.warn('user_token_client_secret is empty (and user_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

request.description: Creates the realm if missing. Keycloak returns 201 when created, and 409 if it already exists.
Creates vendor token client if missing. Returns 201 when created, 409 when already exists.
Creates user token client if missing. Returns 201 when created, 409 when already exists.
Checks whether vendor token client is public/confidential and whether direct access grants are enabled.

exec: console.warn('directAccessGrantsEnabled is false. Password grant token calls will fail.');
console.warn('Client is confidential but vendor token secret is empty. Set vendor_token_client_secret from Keycloak Credentials tab.');

item.name: 6. Bootstrap First Platform Admin Membership (Development Only)

request.description: Generates a usable vendor token. Run after steps 1-6.

exec: console.warn('vendor_token_client_secret is empty (and vendor_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

request.description: Generates elevated token including products.write. Use only when required.

exec: console.warn('vendor_token_client_secret is empty (and vendor_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

item.name: 9. Assign Tenant Role (Optional, Requires vendor platform_admin Token)

request.description: Generates a usable user token. Run after admin setup (steps 1-5).

exec: console.warn('user_token_client_secret is empty (and user_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');

request.description: Generates elevated token including products.write. Use only when required.

exec: console.warn('user_token_client_secret is empty (and user_client_secret fallback is empty). If the token client is confidential, this request will fail.');
